name: Commissioner of Continuity
text:
Whenever a creature you control dies, file its exit paperwork: you gain 1 life and scry 1. (No one truly leaves the department; they are merely reassigned to the archives.)
When Commissioner of Continuity dies, return it to its owner's hand. He has, after all, outlasted everything else.
flavorText: Administrations rise. Administrations fall. The Commissioner files.
